description: This Java class 'OfficerService' implements business logic related to officer workflows in a loan application processing system. It manages operations such as listing submitted applications, retrieving detailed application info, and overriding application decisions, including auditing these actions.
external_methods: auditEventService.writeEvent(String, UUID, String, String, String, String, Map<String, String>)
published: overrideDecision(UUID, UUID, String, String, String, String, String)

classes.name: OfficerService
classes.description: Service handling officer workflows like viewing applications, filtering, and decision overrides, with auditing.

methods.name: queue
methods.description: Lists submitted applications for the officer queue, with optional filtering by status and decision.

methods.name: getApplicationDetail
methods.description: Retrieves detailed information of an application draft by its UUID.

methods.name: overrideDecision
methods.description: Overrides the decision on an application draft, records an audit event, and returns the result.

methods.name: toQueueItem
methods.description: Converts a LoanApplicationDraft object into a QueueItem DTO for listing.

methods.name: toDetail
methods.description: Converts a LoanApplicationDraft object into an ApplicationDetail DTO for detailed view.

calls: auditEventService.writeEvent(String, UUID, String, String, String, String, Map<String, String>)
